title: Section 24
content: The provisions of the following sections and Schedules of the Income-tax Act and the Income-tax (Certificate Proceedings) Rules, 1962, as in force from time to time, shall apply with necessary modifications as if the said provisions and the rules referred to hotel-receipts tax instead of to income-tax:-- 2(43B) and (44), 41(4), 118, 125, 125A, 128 to 136 (both inclusive), 138, 140, 144A, 156, 159 to 163 (both inclusive), 166, 167, 170, 171, 173 to 179 (both inclusive), 187, 188, 189, 219 to 227 (both inclusive), 228A, 229, 231, 232, 237 to 242 (both inclusive), 244, 245, 254 to 262 (both inclusive), 265, 266, 268, 269, 278B, 278C, 278D, 281, 281B, 282, 283, 284, 287, 288, 288A, 288B, 289 to 293 (both inclusive), the Second Schedule and the Third Schedule: Provided that references in the said provisions and the rules to the assessee shall be construed as references to an assessee as defined in this Act.
